# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL server admin login."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL server admin password."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqldb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_1",
        "GP_S_Gen5_2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_4",
        "GP_S_Gen5_8"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU name. Default is Basic."
      }
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "GeneralPurpose"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU tier. Must match skuName tier."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2147483648,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Max size in bytes for the database. Default is 2 GB."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "If true, adds firewall rule to allow Azure services."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "firewallRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', variables('firewallRuleName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    }
  }
}
